title: [MTR4] JR East E131 Series | JR東日本E131系
description: JR East E131 Series for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
The E131 series is a narrow-gauge DC electric multiple unit (EMU) train operated by the East Japan Railway Company (JR East). Designed for smaller lines, they consist of two to four cars per train set and are equipped for driver-only operation (Wanman, ワンマン - "one-man"). They entered service in 2021 in the Chiba area, and subsequent variants for other regions were since introduced.

This resource pack adds the E131 series to the Minecraft Transit Railway mod with a custom model and textures.

The variants included in this pack and their recommended formations are as follows:

- E131-0: 2 cars
- E131-500: 4 cars
- E131-600: 3 cars
- E131-800: 4 cars
